title: Implement Campaign Creation API
description: Create the API endpoint for a logged-in user to create a new campaign. This includes validating the input data, creating the campaign record, and initializing its timeline with a starting tick.
ai_instructions: Follow TDD. The endpoint should be protected by the authorization middleware. It needs to validate that the campaign name is unique for the user. Upon successful creation, it should also trigger the timeline initialization logic.
execution_steps: Write tests for 'POST /campaigns', covering success, unauthorized access, and validation errors (e.g., duplicate name for the same user).
Run tests to see them fail.
Update 'backend/app/models.py' to include the 'Campaign' model based on the SQL DDL.
Update 'backend/app/crud.py' with a 'create_campaign' function that also handles checking for duplicate names.
Add the protected 'POST /campaigns' endpoint to 'backend/app/main.py'. It will use the 'get_current_user' dependency.
Run 'pytest backend/tests/test_campaigns.py' to verify the implementation.
Add '@trace TASK-012' to all modified files.
definition_of_done: API endpoint 'POST /campaigns' is created and protected.
A new campaign is successfully created in the database with valid data.
A new campaign is initialized with a timeline and a single starting tick.
Validation prevents creation with invalid or duplicate data.
All tests for the campaign creation feature pass.
